name: How much is a typical settlement for a crushed foot or broken leg from a forklift accident?
description: Settlements are based on medical costs, lost wages, and your permanent impairment rating. Serious forklift injuries involving surgery or permanent restrictions

mainEntity.name: How much is a typical settlement for a crushed foot or broken leg from a forklift accident?

acceptedAnswer.text: Settlements are based on medical costs, lost wages, and your permanent impairment rating. Serious forklift injuries involving surgery or permanent restrictions often result in significant five- or six-figure settlements depending on your prior earnings.
